storyboard.content: I have been feeling very tired all the time lately.
I have been putting on weight even though I have not changed what I eat.
My skin has been really dry and my hair has been falling out more than usual.
My periods have become more irregular.
I feel cold all the time, even when everyone else around me is comfortable.
These symptoms have come on gradually over the past 3 to 4 months.
I am a 35-year-old woman with no significant medical history.
The tiredness is affecting my energy and mood but I am still able to get through my day.
